mapper.select: select ft.id, ft.name, ft.sort_order as sort, ft.is_visible, count(f.id) as count from friend_types ft left join friends f on f.type_id = ft.id group by ft.id, ft.name, ft.sort_order, ft.is_visible order by ft.sort_order, ft.id limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
mapper.insert: insert into friend_types (name, sort_order, is_visible) values (#{name}, #{sort}, #{visible})
mapper.select: select ft.id, ft.name, ft.sort_order as sort, ft.is_visible, count(f.id) as count from friend_types ft left join friends f on f.type_id = ft.id where ft.id = #{id} group by ft.id, ft.name, ft.sort_order, ft.is_visible
mapper.sql: select f.id, f.name, f.url, f.description, f.avatar, f.screenshot, f.sort_order as sort, f.type_id, ft.name as type_name, f.is_invalid, f.is_pending, f.rss_url, f.accessible from friends f left join friend_types ft on ft.id = f.type_id
mapper.select: order by f.is_pending desc, f.sort_order, f.id limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
mapper.update: update friends set name = #{name}, url = #{url}, description = #{description}, avatar = #{avatar}, screenshot = #{screenshot}, sort_order = #{sort}, type_id = #{typeId}, is_invalid = #{invalid}, is_pending = #{pending}, rss_url = #{rssUrl}, accessible = #{accessible}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select f.id, f.name, f.url, f.description, f.avatar, f.screenshot, f.sort_order as sort, f.type_id, ft.name as type_name, ft.sort_order as type_sort, f.is_invalid from friends f left join friend_types ft on ft.id = f.type_id where f.is_pending = false and (ft.is_visible = true or ft.id is null) order by ft.sort_order, f.sort_order, f.id
